description: Provide SSR-safe locale, direction, messages, time zone, portal container, reduced-motion, and density defaults with composable subtree overrides.
docs: Unreleased canonical source artifact. It does not carry a Stable, published, Quality Passport, or Semantic Sync protection claim.

files.content:
export {
  MergoraProvider,
  resolveMergoraMessage,
  useMergoraContext,
  useMergoraMessage,

  type MergoraDensity,

  type MergoraMessageScalar,
  type MergoraMessageValue,
  type MergoraMessages,

  type MergoraReducedMotion,
